---
description: "Use when designing or refactoring the React + Vite UI with Tailwind CSS (latest)."
---

Design or refactor the UI with a bold, intentional visual system.

Constraints:
- Use Tailwind CSS (latest)
- Do not change Rust or Tauri command contracts
- Keep changes beginner-friendly and explain what changed
- Avoid logging secrets or exposing passwords in UI state
